text.title: Express / Fastify Examples
text.summary: Application setup, router organization, Fastify TypeBox routes, and JWT auth middleware for both frameworks.

example.note: Middleware order is explicit. errorHandler registered last. Rate-limit after logging.
Forced exit after 30 seconds prevents hanging if connections don't drain.
TypeBox schema is the source of truth for both runtime validation and TypeScript types. Handler is thin: bind → service → return.
fp() wrapper is mandatory for the decorator to be visible to routes registered in sibling plugins.

text.reference: Script to flag route handlers missing schema, auth, or error wiring
